zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Knightely於1240年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Robert de Knightley III20歲，母親Aline de Pantulf16歲。她於1290年12月與Sir John d’Oyly II結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1337年在她的家鄉享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Knightely于1240年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Robert de Knightley III20岁，母亲Aline de Pantulf16岁。她于1290年12月与Sir John d’Oyly II结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1337年在她的家乡享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: Knightely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Knightely was born in 1240, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Robert de Knightley III, was 20 and her mother, Aline de Pantulf, was 16. She married Sir John d’Oyly II in December 1290. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1337, in her hometown, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Knightely est née en 1240, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Knightley III, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Aline de Pantulf, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John d’Oyly II en décembre 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1337, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Knightely 1240 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Knightley III 20 und ihre Mutter Aline de Pantulf 16. Sie hat im Dezember 1290 Sir John d’Oyly II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1337 im Alter von 97 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Knightely è nata il nel 1240 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Knightley III, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Aline de Pantulf, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir John d’Oyly II nel dicembre 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1337, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Knightelyが1240年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Knightley IIIは20歳，母Aline de Pantulfは16歳であった。1290年12月にSir John d’Oyly IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1337年に故郷で97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Knightely(이)가 1240년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Knightley III(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline de Pantulf(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1290년 12월 Sir John d’Oyly II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 그녀의 고향에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Knightely nasceu em 1240, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Knightley III, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Aline de Pantulf, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John d’Oyly II em dezembro de 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1337, em sua cidade natal, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Knightely родилась в 1240 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Knightley III было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline de Pantulf, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John d’Oyly II декабрь 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1337 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Knightely nació en 1240, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Knightley III, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Aline de Pantulf, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir John d’Oyly II en diciembre de 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1337, en su pueblo, a la edad de 97 años.
